Hey! Affiliate Partner

Drive Traffic. Earn More. Grow Together.

ABOUT Cars24

Cars24 is one of the leading digital platforms for buying and selling pre-owned vehicles. The platform facilitates high volumes of car transactions every year. Cars24 has simplified the entire car selling and buying experience for customers and partners.

Founded in 2015, Cars24 operates across multiple markets including India, UAE, and Australia, enabling customers to sell their cars from home and buyers to purchase quality-checked vehicles through a trusted marketplace.

Cars24 leverages data science, AI-driven pricing, and a strong logistics network to make car transactions fast, transparent, and hassle-free.

Partnership Overview

Role of Affiliate Partners

Affiliate Partners are an important part of the Cars24 growth ecosystem. They help to connect car sellers with the Cars24 platform by generating leads for buying and selling the car and supporting the overall vehicle acquisition process.

Through this partnership, affiliates not only contribute to increasing the supply of cars on the platform but also benefit from a scalable earning opportunity, transparent performance tracking, and the chance to grow alongside one of the leading digital automotive marketplaces.

The Affiliate Partner Program provides partners with the opportunity to earn attractive performance-based incentives, depending on their operational efficiency and overall contribution to the marketplace.

Business Verticals for Affiliate Partners

🚗
Sell the car to Cars24
🛒

Onboarding Journey

3-Phase Partner Process

From first contact to live traffic — a structured, transparent onboarding process.

01

🤝 Discussion with the Cars24 Team

Align on the business area, campaign objectives, operational workflow, and roles before getting started. 🚀

Campaign Briefing Workflow Clarity Role Alignment
02

💼 Commercials Alignment

Align on payout structures, KPIs, and commercial terms across all active business verticals before any agreement is signed.

Payout Review KPI Targets Term Sheet
03

📝 Agreement Creation

Complete legal documentation, KYC verification, and GST registration before any traffic is activated.

KYC Docs GSTIN Certificate Legal Review
The Process

How the Program Works

Simple four-step journey from click to payout.

01
📣

Promote

Drive traffic to Cars24 pages using any channel — social media, SEO, digital marketing, display ads, CRM campaigns, and more.

02
📅

Book

Users referred by you book services through Cars24's platform — via App (Branch) or Web. Every action is tracked to your affiliate ID.

03
🔍

Convert

Cars24 processes the lead — inspection, visit, report, or loan. Each conversion is measured against your KPIs.

04
💰

Earn

Your payout = Formula output × Volume. Hit all KPIs and unlock the maximum rate for each business stream.

Phase 2 — Commercials

All Payout Structures

Six distinct revenue streams, each with its own formula, KPIs, and earning potential.

1

Seller Payout (CPI — Cost Per Inspection)

Drive car sellers to Cars24. Earn a performance-linked CPI (Cost Per Inspection) based on three quality KPIs: ASP (Average Selling Price), I2SI% (Inspection to Stock-In / Procurement), and A2I% (Appointment to Inspection).

1400 × (A2I% / 50%) × (I2SI% / 16%) × (ASP / ₹2,75,000)
₹1,400 baseper inspection
2

Buyer Payout (CPV — Cost Per Visit)

Drive car buyers to Cars24. Earn based on V2D% (Visit to Delivery) conversion and visit volume, plus a flat CF (Consumer Finance) conversion fee.

[1000 × (V2D% / 16%) × No. of Visits] + CF
₹1,000 baseCPV (Cost Per Visit)
3

PDI Orders (Pre-Delivery Inspection)

Facilitate pre-delivery inspection orders. Higher monthly volume unlocks a higher per-order rate.

0 – 200 orders → ₹600/order
200 – 500 orders → ₹700/order
500+ orders → ₹800/order
Slab-basedper order
4

Challan Orders

Earn a flat fee for every challan order processed through your affiliate channel. No KPI conditions.

₹50 flatper challan order
5

VHR Orders

Earn a flat fee for each Vehicle History Report generated via your traffic. Highly scalable, no volume cap.

₹100 flatper VHR generated
6

LAC — Loan Against Car

Facilitate loan against car disbursals through your affiliate channel and earn a percentage commission on disbursed amount.

1% commissionon loan disbursal
How It Works — Seller Journey

Home Inspection Process

Understanding the seller flow helps you drive better-quality leads and maximise your CPI (Cost Per Inspection) earnings.

1
Customer Discovers Cars24
Your referral drives the customer to the Cars24 App. This is where the lead originates — the customer registers interest in selling their car.
2
Car Details & Appointment Booking
The customer enters their car's details (make, model, year, mileage) on the app and books a home inspection appointment at a time that suits them. This is the A2I (Appointment to Inspection) stage.
3
Cars24 Expert Visits the Customer
A trained Cars24 inspector visits the customer's doorstep, evaluates the vehicle, and provides an instant price quote — no hassle, no showroom visit required.
✓
Inspection Completed → You Earn CPI
Once the inspection is done and the car moves to stock (I2SI — Inspection to Stock-In), your CPI payout is calculated based on ASP, A2I%, and I2SI% performance.
💡
Partner Tip
The higher the quality of your leads (customers who actually show up for inspection and have well-maintained cars), the better your A2I%, I2SI%, and ASP — and the higher your CPI payout, up to ₹1,400 per inspection.
How It Works — Buyer Journey

Car Booking & Delivery Process

Understanding the buyer flow helps you drive high-intent leads and maximise your CPV (Cost Per Visit) earnings through V2D (Visit to Delivery) conversions.

1
Customer Discovers Cars24 LEAD
Your referral brings the customer to the Cars24 App. The moment they register interest in buying a car, they become a qualified lead attributed to you.
2
Browse & Discover Cars
The customer explores our catalogue of ~10,000 listed cars — filtered by budget, brand, fuel type, and more. Every car is certified and transparently priced.
3
Book a Visit Slot
Once the customer shortlists a car, they book a convenient time slot to visit the nearest Cars24 Hub — no pressure, no salesperson follow-ups.
🚗
Visit Hub & Take a Test Drive VISIT
The customer visits the Cars24 Hub, physically inspects the car, and takes a test drive. This visit is the key milestone — it's what counts as a CPV (Cost Per Visit) event.
✓
Car Delivery → You Earn V2D Bonus V2D
Customer finalises the purchase and takes delivery of the car. This conversion from Visit to Delivery is tracked as V2D (Visit to Delivery) — the higher your V2D%, the higher your CPV payout, plus a CF (Consumer Finance) bonus if the customer opts for a loan.
💡
Partner Tip
The more visits you generate, the more base CPV you earn. But the real multiplier is V2D% (Visit to Delivery rate) — refer buyers who are genuinely ready to purchase. A customer who visits and buys delivers significantly higher payouts, up to ₹1,000 CPV + CF bonus.

KPI Rules

Payout Conditions

For KPI-linked payouts (Seller & Buyer), your performance directly determines your rate.

✅

All KPIs Achieved → Maximum Fixed CPI (Cost Per Inspection) / CPV (Cost Per Visit)

When all KPIs meet or exceed baselines, you earn the full fixed rate — ₹1,400 (Seller) or ₹1,000 (Buyer). No reductions applied.

⚠️

One or More KPIs Missed → Pro-Rata Rate

Missing any single KPI reduces your payout proportionally. Other achieved KPIs still contribute fully — only the missed metric is reduced.

❌

All KPIs Missed → Significant Rate Reduction

If all KPIs fall below baseline simultaneously, the combined multiplier effect causes a significant drop — well below the maximum rate.

Phase 3 — Paperwork

Agreement Requirements

To execute the contract, partners must provide the following documents. Legal team will review before signing.

🏢

Registered Company Details

Registered company name, corporate address, and type of incorporation.

📜

GSTIN Certificate

Valid GST registration certificate linked to your business entity.

✍️

Signatory Details

Name, designation, and email of the authorised signatory for the agreement.

👤

Witness Details

Name, designation, and email of a witness for the contract execution.

🔍

Partner KYC Documents

Standard KYC documentation as required by Cars24's compliance team.

⚖️

Legal Review

Cars24's legal team will review all documents before the agreement is drafted and signed.

Campaign Guidelines

Do's & Don'ts

❌ Prohibited Activities

  • Brand bidding on Cars24 keywords in paid search
  • DND (Do Not Disturb) calling or messaging
  • Cookie stuffing or affiliate fraud
  • Misleading claims about pricing or offers
  • Impersonation of Cars24 brand or employees
  • Spam tactics of any kind

⚠️ Important Notice

Brand bidding will be penalized — detailed terms and consequences will be explicitly mentioned in the affiliate agreement.

📐 CPI Formula Matrix
CPI = 1400 × (A2I% ÷ 50%) × (ASP ÷ ₹2,75,000) × (I2SI% ÷ 16%) — Use sliders below to see how each lever changes CPI and payout.
📅 Appointment Push Factor
Multiply reported appointments (e.g. 0.9 = −10%)
× appointments
💰 ASP Deduction %
Reduce reported ASP by % (e.g. 5 = −5%)
% off ASP
📦 Stock-in Day Filter
Pro-rate stocks by N days ÷ 30 (0 = no filter)
days
🔧 CPI Override (₹)
Flat ₹ adjustment per inspection. Overrides formula CPI when non-zero.
₹ / inspection

Partner Portal
Sign in to access your dashboard
Admin login: username admin
Partner login: use your assigned username & password
(same form — just enter your credentials)
📥 Import Partner Data
Data is saved month-on-month · Payout & targets protected from overwrite
Step 1 — Select report type
Partner View: multi-row per partner with Region/Source/Medium. Month auto-detected from file. Admin View: one row per partner with organic columns (Appointment_O, Stockins_o, ASP_o, A2I_O, CPI_o, Payout_o). Organic data stored for admin analytics. Buyer Report: multi-row per partner across channels/sources. Columns: Partner Name · Sessions · BI · BC · Visit · Token · Delivery · CF. Aggregated by sum. Grand Total and Unknown rows skipped automatically.
Step 2 — Month
Select the month this data belongs to before importing
📋 Partner View Columns
Partner Name1 REGION SOURCE_MEDIUM LEADS Appointments_Total Inspections_Total A2I_Total Stockins_Total Payout_Total_000
Multi-row per partner · month in header row
👁 Admin View Columns
Partner Name1 LEADS Appointments_Total Appointment_O Inspections_Total Stockins_Total Stockins_o ASP_o A2I_O CPI_o Payout_o Payout_Total_000
Orange = admin-only organic fields · One row per partner
🛒 Buyer Report Columns
FINAL_CHANNEL_GROUP FINAL_CHANNEL_GROUP_1 FINAL_CHANNEL FINAL_SOURCE Partner Name Sessions BI BC Visit Token Delivery CF
Green = key metrics · Multi-row per partner · Grand Total & Unknown auto-skipped
For selected
view type
